title: Agent
description: A conversational AI voice agent that combines Neuphonic TTS with GPT-4o for interactive voice applications.

prompt.description: System prompt defining the agent's personality and behavior.

voice.description: Voice ID used by the agent for speech synthesis.

lang_code.description: Language code for the agent's speech output.

mcp_servers.description: List of Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations integrated with this agent.

name.description: Display name for the MCP server.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the agent was created.
